command_line: cd /workspace && rm -rf game-2048 && npm create vite@latest game-2048 -- --template react-ts
cd /workspace/game-2048 && npm install && npm install -D vitest jsdom @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom @testing-library/user-event

cd /workspace/game-2048 && cat > package.json <<'EOF'
{
  "name": "game-2048",
  "private": true,
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4173",
    "build": "tsc -b && vite build",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:watch": "vitest",
    "lint": "eslint .",
    "preview": "vite preview --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4173"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "react": "^19.2.4",
    "react-dom": "^19.2.4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@eslint/js": "^9.39.4",
    "@testing-library/jest-dom": "^6.9.1",
    "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.2",
    "@testing-library/user-event": "^14.6.1",
    "@types/node": "^24.12.0",
    "@types/react": "^19.2.14",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.2.3",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^6.0.1",
    "eslint": "^9.39.4",
    "eslint-plugin-react-hooks": "^7.0.1",
    "eslint-plugin-react-refresh": "^0.5.2",
    "globals": "^17.4.0",
    "jsdom": "^29.0.1",
    "typescript": "~5.9.3",
    "typescript-eslint": "^8.57.0",
    "vite": "^8.0.1",
    "vitest": "^4.1.2"
  }
}
EOF

cat > vite.config.ts <<'EOF'
import { defineConfig } from 'vite'
import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [react()],
  test: {
    environment: 'jsdom',
    globals: true,
    setupFiles: './src/test/setup.ts',
  },
})
EOF
mkdir -p src/test
cat > src/test/setup.ts <<'EOF'
import '@testing-library/jest-dom'
EOF

cd /workspace/game-2048 && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('src/game/logic.test.ts')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace("    expect(result.board[0]).toEqual([4, 4, null, null])\n    expect(getEmptyCells(result.board)).toHaveLength(13)\n", "    expect(result.board[0][0]).toBe(4)\n    expect(result.board[0][1]).toBe(4)\n    expect(getEmptyCells(result.board)).toHaveLength(13)\n")
p.write_text(text)
PY
npm test

cd /workspace/game-2048 && node -e "const fs=require('fs');let t=fs.readFileSync('src/game/logic.test.ts','utf8');t=t.replace(\"    expect(result.board[0]).toEqual([4, 4, null, null])\\n    expect(getEmptyCells(result.board)).toHaveLength(13)\\n\",\"    expect(result.board[0][0]).toBe(4)\\n    expect(result.board[0][1]).toBe(4)\\n    expect(getEmptyCells(result.board)).toHaveLength(13)\\n\");fs.writeFileSync('src/game/logic.test.ts',t);" && npm test

cd /workspace/game-2048 && cat > tsconfig.app.json <<'EOF'
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "tsBuildInfoFile": "./node_modules/.tmp/tsconfig.app.tsbuildinfo",
    "target": "ES2023",
    "useDefineForClassFields": true,
    "lib": ["ES2023", "DOM", "DOM.Iterable"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "types": ["vite/client"],
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "verbatimModuleSyntax": true,
    "moduleDetection": "force",
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "strict": true,
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "erasableSyntaxOnly": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
    "noUncheckedSideEffectImports": true
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*.ts", "src/**/*.tsx"],
  "exclude": ["src/**/*.test.ts", "src/**/*.test.tsx"]
}
EOF
cat > tsconfig.node.json <<'EOF'
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "tsBuildInfoFile": "./node_modules/.tmp/tsconfig.node.tsbuildinfo",
    "target": "ES2023",
    "lib": ["ES2023"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "types": ["node"],
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "verbatimModuleSyntax": true,
    "moduleDetection": "force",
    "noEmit": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noUnusedLocals": true,
    "noUnusedParameters": true,
    "erasableSyntaxOnly": true,
    "noFallthroughCasesInSwitch": true,
    "noUncheckedSideEffectImports": true
  },
  "include": ["vite.config.ts"]
}
EOF
cat > tsconfig.vitest.json <<'EOF'
{
  "extends": "./tsconfig.app.json",
  "compilerOptions": {
    "types": ["vite/client", "vitest/globals"]
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*.test.ts", "src/**/*.test.tsx", "src/test/setup.ts"]
}
EOF
cat > vite.config.ts <<'EOF'
/// <reference types="vitest/config" />
import { defineConfig } from 'vitest/config'
import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [react()],
  test: {
    environment: 'jsdom',
    globals: true,
    setupFiles: './src/test/setup.ts',
  },
})
EOF
npm test && npm run build
